data.body: passes.pass2_verify: a SEPARATE aggregate verifier (one pass over ALL findings, batched, not per-finding) emitting coarse severity ATTRIBUTES {prod/debt_impact, blast_radius, likelihood, reversibility} + the typed BINARY sub-answer set {yes|no|insufficient} incl. the cited_reference_accurate veto; agentic (tool-using) when any finding is code-grounded, single-turn otherwise; non-frontier model (sonnet) via verifier_cfg. Contract plan_review_verification. Findings presented as claims-to-test (independence).
